text: COMPANY NEWS: Welcome to Shift Cycle 1. Your neural implant has been calibrated to facility standards. Productivity metrics are logged automatically. Have an optimal day.
CIVIC NOTICE: The Human Labor Continuity Act has been extended for an additional quarter. All biological workers remain protected under Clause 7. Thank you for your patience during the review period.
HR UPDATE: Worker E. Vasquez (Station 4) has accepted a voluntary Optimized Role Assignment effective immediately. We celebrate her contributions and wish her well in her new capacity.
PERSONAL MESSAGE — UNKNOWN SENDER: Elena didn't volunteer. I know what they're doing. Don't approve the unit with the scratched serial — [MESSAGE CORRUPTED]

SYSTEM NOTIFICATION: Human oversight protocols have been deprecated at this facility. All QC functions are now fully automated. Human biological units have been reclassified as Legacy Infrastructure under Directive 44-C. This is not a demotion.
SYSTEM NOTIFICATION: This feed will no longer be updated. Complete your queue.
